title: Former cop convicted of manslaughter; Pentagon releases UFO files | Nightly Roundup
description: From a former Prescott police officer being found guilty of manslaughter for a shooting stemming back to 2024, to the Pentagon releasing its third batch of UFO files, here are tonight's top stories.

title: New UFO files describe spinning discs, glowing orbs and object shaped like a potato
description: Seventy-two more files on UFOs were released on Friday, the third tranche to give the public full disclosure around what the government knows about alien life and mysterious objects in the sky.

title: Newly Released UFO Files Highlight Repeated Sightings in Remote US Area
description: The latest batch of declassified documents from the Pentagon reveals a peculiar phenomenon whereby strange glowing lights have been consistently observed in a secluded location in the northeastern United States. Residents near a remote pond have reported seeing these glowing orbs long after dusk, noting that the objects often hover above the water, traverse through [...] The post Newly Released UFO Files Highlight Repeated Sightings in Remote US Area appeared first on The CSR Journal .

title: Discs, Orbs, ‘Heavenly’ Phenomena, and More Revealed in 3rd Batch of Declassified UFO Files
description: The third release of documents includes reports of UFO and UAP encounters from the United States, Zimbabwe, and Hungary.
